error.title: File upload failed
error.description:
## {upload_type} upload failed
The file could not be uploaded to the AYON server after repeated attempts.
### How to resolve?
1. Try publishing again once your network or VPN is stable. 2. If it still fails after a few tries, use the icon in lower left corner of the Publisher to export the publish report, and send it to **Pipeline Engineering** for investigation.
**File:** `{file}`
**Error:** `{error}`

error.title: File upload failed
error.description:
## {upload_type} upload failed
The connection was lost or timed out while uploading to the AYON server.
### How to resolve?
1. Try publishing again. If the problem is intermittent, a retry often works. 2. If it keeps failing, open the **Report** tab in the Publisher, copy or export the publish report, and send it to **Pipeline Engineering** along with the file path and error below.
**File:** `{file}`
**Error:** `{error}`
